title: veronica linariifolia var. jeholensis
intro: Veronica linariifolia var. jeholensis is a plant species, also known as the "Jehol Veronica", belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae), which is native to East Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of iridoids and flavonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Veronica linariifolia var. jeholensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, making it a useful remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal medicine, Veronica linariifolia var. jeholensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves and flowers in water.
